channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish on corner of road, 10th May
item.description:
Consistently every night a resident dumps bags of rubbish that is then tracked up and down the adjacent roads. The road tonight is disgusting. The council should clean up & identify who it is who dumps on the corner of Elderfield and Glenarm Road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elderfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Again.. fly tipping outside no11/13, 10th May
item.description:
It’s constant.. now two fridges and bags dumped on the pavement outside no 11/13 Nelgarde rd.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Nelgarde Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Junction of Lower Terrace and Branch Hill, 10th May
item.description:
The street light on Lower Terrace close to Branch Hill is out. It's an accident black spot even with working lights so please treat as urgent. No point in taking a photo as it's pitch black. I think this has been out since last week but can't be sure as I've been away.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Lower Terrace, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Every week there is new fly tipping, 10th May
item.description:
I had a message to say that ref 9292961 was fixed but as you see from the photos the Rubish is still there and people at to it I have cleared some myself but new stuff arrives Could this please be cleared

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Storm drain blocked, 10th May
item.description:
Storm drain had awful smell and is blocked.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Narrow Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas canisters dumped, 10th May
item.description:
There is a box of gas canister and more by the side - that have been dumped (again) - they are in the sun and could explode
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheviot Close, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking fire access driveway, 10th May
item.description:
Blocking emergency access driveway for 4 garages and double yellow Blips
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight 42R on Red Hill, Chislehurst, BR7 is not working, 10th May
item.description:
Streetlight 42R on Red Hill, Chislehurst, BR7 is not working. The light has been off for a few weeks now. Please can you attend to fix. Regards
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Hill, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parking in ambulance bay, 10th May
item.description:
Car parking in ambulance bay blocking access
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cumberland Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped artificial grass and cigarette butts, 10th May
item.description:
Firstly someone has dumped some artificial grass, and there are always cigarette butts but the back gate, on heath side, the property is 106c, Pickford Lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bristow Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th May
item.description:
On going rubbish dumping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 10th May
item.description:
This rubbish has been here for weeks I have reported to Enfield Council but it has not been removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burlington Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 10th May
item.description:
This fly tip has been here weeks and has been reported to Enfield Council, but has not been removed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lancaster Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti sprayed on shop shutter next to 226 Rafi Barber shop Brixton road SW9., 10th May
item.description:
A graffiti tag has been sprayed on a shop shutter next to Rafi Barber shop 226 Brixton road SW9. The graffiti has been there for approximately three weeks. Unfortunately there has been a surge again along Brixton main road. Please can the graffiti be removed it be very much appreciated.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 238, Brixton Road, Oval, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rufus House, ST Saviours Estate, Abbey Street, 10th May
item.description:
We found the graffiti on staircase window. Please paint it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, Maltby Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 25 harvist road, 10th May
item.description:
Overgrown plant occupying half of the pedestrian pathway
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 10th May
item.description:
Brook Vale, Becton place and York Terrace have an excessive amount of litter strewn all over the pavements, and in curbs and roads. Litter pickers are needed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Vale, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 23 harvist road, 10th May
item.description:
There is a persistent accumulation of household waste overflowing in the front area of the property. Although most of the waste is within the property boundary, it is heavily overfilled, creating concerns regarding vermin, odour, hygiene, and waste dispersal into the public area. The issue appears ongoing rather than a one-off missed collection.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Caravan in a dangerous junction location, 10th May
item.description:
Abandoned Caravan in a dangerous location at the junction. Extremely dangerous due to already narrow roads especially for passing buses and bigger vehicles. Drivers coming up on the same side as the parked caravan do not have a clear view of on-coming vehicles to safely overtake due to its huge size. This is an accident location waiting to happen. There is a children nursery at the same junction and creating hazards for parents and children. The caravan has been in the same spot for weeks! Urgent action must be taken to remove the caravan. In fact, the row of vehicles parked along this high street road is creating hazard on a daily basis due to already narrow roads. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 191, High Street, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and debris, 10th May
item.description:
This stretch of White Horse Hill between Telegraph Path & Oakdene Ave is litter strewn on both sides and also on and adjacent to the elevated footpath. Please could the area be litter picked and kept tidy especially after weekly bin collections? Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Hill, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
